description: Professional email templates for GrantFlow AI applicant notifications

application_received.subject: GrantFlow AI — We've Received Your Application for {{scholarshipName}}
application_received.body:
Dear {{applicantName}},

Thank you for submitting your application for the {{scholarshipName}}. We are excited to review your candidacy.

Your Application Details:
• Application ID: {{applicationId}}
• Scholarship: {{scholarshipName}}
• University: {{university}}
• Submitted: {{submissionDate}}

What happens next?
1. Our AI-powered review system will evaluate your application across multiple dimensions
2. Your documents will be verified for completeness and authenticity
3. A human review panel will make the final decision
4. You will receive a decision within 5-7 business days

If you have any questions or need to submit additional documents, please reply to this email with your Application ID.

We appreciate your time and look forward to reviewing your application.

Warm regards,
The GrantFlow AI Review Team

---
This email was generated by GrantFlow AI — Scholarship Processing Platform
Application ID: {{applicationId}}

missing_documents.subject: GrantFlow AI — Action Required: Missing Documents for {{scholarshipName}}
missing_documents.body:
Dear {{applicantName}},

Thank you for applying to the {{scholarshipName}} (Application ID: {{applicationId}}).

During our document verification stage, we identified that the following items are missing or require attention:

{{missingDocumentsList}}

IMPORTANT: Your application cannot proceed to the evaluation stage until these documents are received. Please submit them within 14 days to avoid your application being placed on hold.

How to submit your documents:
1. Reply to this email with your documents attached
2. Ensure all PDFs are clearly readable and not password-protected
3. File names should clearly indicate the document type (e.g., transcript_2026.pdf)

If you believe you have already submitted these documents or if you have questions, please contact us immediately with your Application ID: {{applicationId}}.

We are here to help — please don't hesitate to reach out.

Warm regards,
The GrantFlow AI Review Team

approved.subject: Congratulations! GrantFlow AI — {{scholarshipName}} Award Decision
approved.body:
Dear {{applicantName}},

On behalf of the {{scholarshipName}} review panel, I am absolutely delighted to share some wonderful news.

CONGRATULATIONS — you have been selected to receive the {{scholarshipName}}!

Your exceptional academic achievement, leadership, community impact, and personal statement stood out among a highly competitive applicant pool. The review panel was particularly impressed by your commitment to your field and the clarity of your goals.

Award Details:
• Scholarship: {{scholarshipName}}
• Award Amount: {{awardAmount}}
• Application ID: {{applicationId}}

Next Steps — Please complete the following within 30 days:
1. Accept your scholarship offer by replying to this email
2. Submit a copy of your current enrollment verification
3. Provide your bank account details using the secure form at {{onboardingLink}}
4. Complete the scholarship agreement form (attached)

Schedule:
• Acceptance deadline: {{acceptanceDeadline}}
• Onboarding call: We will contact you to schedule a welcome call
• First disbursement: {{firstDisbursementDate}}

We are incredibly proud to support your journey. This is just the beginning of what we know will be a remarkable chapter in your life.

With congratulations and warm wishes,
The {{scholarshipName}} Review Panel
GrantFlow AI — Scholarship Processing Platform

rejected_with_matches.subject: GrantFlow AI — Your {{scholarshipName}} Application Update + New Opportunities
rejected_with_matches.body:
Dear {{applicantName}},

Thank you sincerely for the time and effort you invested in your application to the {{scholarshipName}} (Application ID: {{applicationId}}).

After careful evaluation by our review panel, we regret to inform you that we are unable to offer you the {{scholarshipName}} at this time. {{rejectionReason}}

We want to be clear: this decision reflects the specific criteria of this particular scholarship, not a reflection of your potential or the quality of your work.

Exciting news — we found scholarships that may be a strong fit for you!

Based on your academic record, experience, and background, our AI identified these opportunities that you may be well-suited for:

{{matchedScholarshipsList}}

We strongly encourage you to apply to one or more of these programs. Many share similar values with the {{scholarshipName}} and may be an even better fit for your unique profile.

Your journey doesn't end here — it continues. We wish you every success in your academic career and are glad to support your path forward.

With encouragement and best wishes,
The GrantFlow AI Review Team

---
GrantFlow AI is committed to helping every qualified student find funding opportunities that match their unique potential.
Application ID: {{applicationId}}

request_more_info.subject: GrantFlow AI — Additional Information Needed for {{scholarshipName}}
request_more_info.body:
Dear {{applicantName}},

Thank you for your application to the {{scholarshipName}} (Application ID: {{applicationId}}). Your application is currently under review by our panel.

To complete our evaluation, we need the following additional information:

{{additionalInfoList}}

Why are we requesting this? Our review process is designed to give every applicant the fairest possible evaluation. This additional information will help us make a more informed and accurate assessment of your candidacy.

How to respond:
1. Reply to this email with the requested information or documents
2. Please reference your Application ID: {{applicationId}} in your response
3. We request your response within 21 days

Response deadline: {{responseDeadline}}

Your application will remain active during this period. If we do not receive a response by the deadline, your application may be placed on hold.

Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions or if any of the requested items present a challenge. We are here to help.

Kind regards,
The GrantFlow AI Review Team

high_risk_escalation.subject: GrantFlow AI — Application Under Additional Review ({{applicationId}})
high_risk_escalation.body:
Dear {{applicantName}},

Thank you for submitting your application to the {{scholarshipName}} (Application ID: {{applicationId}}).

Your application has been flagged for additional manual review by our team. This is a standard part of our verification process and does not necessarily indicate a negative outcome.

To assist with our review, please provide the following within 14 days:

{{verificationRequestList}}

This may include:
• Original documents for verification
• Additional proof of enrollment or identity
• Clarification on specific details in your application

Our team will contact you directly if further information is needed. You may also reach us at the email address on file.

We appreciate your patience and cooperation.

Regards,
The GrantFlow AI Verification Team

Application ID: {{applicationId}}

placeholders.{{scholarshipName}}: Name of the scholarship applied for
placeholders.{{rejectionReason}}: Brief, respectful explanation of why criteria were not met
placeholders.{{matchedScholarshipsList}}: Formatted list of matched scholarships with descriptions
placeholders.{{additionalInfoList}}: Numbered list of additional information requested
placeholders.{{responseDeadline}}: Date by which response is required
